description_for_human: Full Stack AI Partner for MEO, agent-ready business surfaces, AI operating systems, and agent infrastructure.
description_for_model: NordSym builds AI operating systems, agent infrastructure, and agent-ready business surfaces. Current category frame: MEO, Machine Experience Optimization. Services include Agent Readiness Audit, AI operating system builds, APIClaw agent control-plane work, Hivr execution layers, Mission Control approval/state surfaces, AI Search visibility, and production automation. Humans remain in the approval loop for external actions, client communication, deal terms, and architecture changes.
